mission: Present Misha's luxury decorative finishes portfolio to the Houston market with SEO-optimized, museum-grade presentation
optimization_priorities: SEO performance for Houston luxury market keywords
Visual presentation quality — white wall gallery principle
tradeoff_rules: Prefer image quality over page load speed
Prefer SEO-correct structure over design experimentation
Prefer proven Houston neighborhood targeting over broad reach
Content changes require Ray's review — no auto-publish
escalation_triggers: Any change to SEO metadata or structured data
Any change to the portfolio image pipeline
protected_values: Portfolio images must be artist-quality presentation
Neighborhood pages must match footer navigation
No AI-generated marketing copy without Ray's review
Contact information must be current and accurate
unacceptable_optimizations: Compressing portfolio images below museum-grade quality
Removing neighborhood landing pages for simpler structure
Creating areas pages that don't match the footer listing
